name: Banana-Orange Frozen Push-Ups
recipeInstructions:
1. Thaw orange juice until it reaches a soft consistency.
2. Peel and slice the bananas.
3. Add the sliced bananas and remaining ingredients to a blender or food processor.
4. Cover and blend until foamy.
5. Pour into small paper cups and freeze.
6. To eat, squeeze the bottom of the cup.
7. Alternatively, pour into popsicle mold.
